basic_details.job_title: TSLPRB Recruitment 2026: 7,437 Vacancies Approved for SI, ASI, Constable, Fire, Jailor and SPF Posts
basic_details.department: Police Department, Fire Disaster Response Emergency and Civil Defence Department, Prisons & Correctional Services Department, Special Protection Force (SPF)
basic_details.short_information: The Telangana State Level Police Recruitment Board (TSLPRB) has received official permission from the Government of Telangana to fill 7,437 vacancies across the Police Department, Fire Disaster Response Emergency and Civil Defence Department, Prisons & Correctional Services Department, and Special Protection Force (SPF). This approval was announced via a press note dated 5th July 2026, and detailed recruitment notifications are expected to be issued shortly.

important_dates.raw: The press note does not specify application start dates, closing dates, or examination dates at this stage. TSLPRB has confirmed that recruitment notifications carrying these details will be issued shortly, once local cadre-wise distribution, roster points, and qualification details are received from the Home Department and concerned departments. | GO Ms No. 78 (Police Department) issued: 27th June 2026 GO Ms No. 80 (Fire Department) issued: 3rd July 2026 GO Ms No. 83 (Prisons Department) issued: 3rd July 2026 GO Ms No. 84 (Special Protection Force) issued: 3rd July 2026 Press Note Released: 5th July 2026 Recruitment Notification: To be issued shortly Notification Release Date: To be released soon Application Start Date: Updated Soon Last Date to Apply: Updated Soon

vacancy_details.Post: Fire Disaster Response Emergency and Civil Defence Department (GO Ms No. 80, dated 03-07-2026)
Prisons & Correctional Services Department (GO Ms No. 83, dated 03-07-2026)

post_wise_breakdown.post: Fire Disaster Response Emergency and Civil Defence Department (GO Ms No. 80, dated 03-07-2026)
Prisons & Correctional Services Department (GO Ms No. 83, dated 03-07-2026)
Special Protection Force (GO Ms No. 84, dated 03-07-2026)

important_instructions: This press note only confirms government permission for recruitment; it is not the final recruitment notification. Detailed notifications will be issued after TSLPRB receives local cadre-wise distribution, roster points, and qualification details from the Principal Secretary to Government, Home Department, and heads of the concerned departments. Candidates should rely only on official TSLPRB notifications for dates, eligibility, fee, and application procedures. Vacancy numbers mentioned are as per the respective Government Orders (GO Ms No. 78, 80, 83, and 84 of the Finance (HRM VII) Department) and are subject to the final notification.

rows.details: Telangana State Level Police Recruitment Board (TSLPRB)
Police Department, Fire Disaster Response Emergency and Civil Defence Department, Prisons & Correctional Services Department, Special Protection Force (SPF)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: The press note does not specify application start dates, closing dates, or examination dates at this stage. TSLPRB has confirmed that recruitment notifications carrying these details will be issued shortly, once local cadre-wise distribution, roster points, and qualification details are received from the Home Department and concerned departments. GO Ms No. 78 (Police Department) issued: 27th June 2026 GO Ms No. 80 (Fire Department) issued: 3rd July 2026 GO Ms No. 83 (Prisons Department) issued: 3rd July 2026 GO Ms No. 84 (Special Protection Force) issued: 3rd July 2026 Press Note Released: 5th July 2026 Recruitment Notification: To be issued shortly Notification Release Date: To be released soon Application Start Date: Updated Soon Last Date to Apply: Updated Soon

content_sections.heading: TSLPRB Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: A total of 7,437 vacancies have been approved across four departments. The Police Department accounts for the largest share, led by Police Constable (Civil) with 3,697 posts, followed by Police Constable (AR) with 1,052 posts. Recruitment Notifications will be issued in a few days on receipt of the details of all vacant posts permitted to be filled up in the aforementioned Government Orders, including the local cadre-wise distribution, roster points, qualifications etc from the Principal Secretary to Government, Home Department / Heads of the concerned Departments.

Detailed notifications will be issued after TSLPRB receives local cadre-wise distribution, roster points, and qualification details from the Principal Secretary to Government, Home Department, and heads of the concerned departments. Candidates should rely only on official TSLPRB notifications for dates, eligibility, fee, and application procedures. Vacancy numbers mentioned are as per the respective Government Orders (GO Ms No. 78, 80, 83, and 84 of the Finance (HRM VII) Department) and are subject to the final notification.

faq.question: Q1. What is TSLPRB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: TSLPRB Recruitment 2026 is a major Telangana Police recruitment drive to fill 7,437 vacancies across SI, Constable, Fire Services, Jail Warder, and Special Protection Force posts.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced under TSLPRB 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 7,437 vacancies have been approved for various posts in Telangana Police and allied departments.

faq.question: Q3. What are the posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The posts include Sub Inspector, Assistant Sub Inspector, Police Constable, Fire Fighter, Station Fire Officer, Deputy Jailor, Warder, and SPF Constable/SI.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for TSLPRB 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is online through the official TSLPRB website once the detailed notification is released.

faq.question: Q5. When will the application process start?
faq.answer: The application start date will be announced soon after the release of the official detailed notification.
